use_cases: Displaying user profile information and summaries in dashboard interfaces
Presenting product or service details with structured headers and descriptions
Creating dashboard widgets with consistent visual styling and layout
Organizing form sections with clear visual hierarchy using CardHeader, CardContent, and CardFooter
Building data visualization containers that group related metrics and information
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style composable card component system with six sub-components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) for building structured content containers. Features minimalist styling with rounded corners, subtle borders, and shadow effects. Designed for dashboard interfaces and data-display layouts across various industries, providing flexible composition for headers, titles, descriptions, main content areas, and footers.
